emails.subject: City of Glendale
emails.body: Sara, The City of Glendale is ready to set up a conference call to go over the minor changes that they would like to see in the ISDA agreement. Would you be available to do this call with them on Wednesday afternoon? Please let me know as soon as possible if so and what time so I can set it up with the customer. Also, they would like an electronic verson of the opinion letter. Can you have one sent to me? Call me if you have any questions x30685. Thanks, Kim Ward

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: We will have our conference call with Glendale at 3:30 our time on Wednesday. Is your office OK? Jay, if you would like to join us, you are welcome. I don't know if any of their changes will include the credit annex or not. Sara, Steve will also want to know what else we need from him I know it is listed in the doc) and when he needs to provide such. Thanks for your assistance! Kim Ward

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: If it is ok with you, we will meet in your office and call them. Let me know. Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: City of Glendale
emails.body: Sara, Believe it or not, we are very close getting our signed ISDA from the City of Glendale. Steve Lins, the City attorney had a couple of questions which I will attempt to relay without having a copy of the documents. 1) I am assuming that he obtained a for legal opinion letter or document of some sort. This document references a confirmation and we are not sure what this references. Typically, it references a transaction, which in this case, there are no transactions yet. He feels this reference should be deleted. What is your opinion regarding this? 2) We sent him a couple of form documents to facilitate the documents required under the ISDA. One form ws a form resolution. They have already received City Council approval to enter into financial tranactions and to enter into an ISDA with us. Steve is going to get a certified copy of this Resolution. Will this suffice? When you return, I may try to do one last conference call to alleviate any unanswered questions. I think we will have an executed ISDA with the City of Glendale by the end of next week. I am going to be out there meeting with them on Wednesday. Thanks for your help, Kim

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: RE: City of Glendale Kim: Can you obtain the name of Glendale's bond counsel (lawyer's name, phone number, email, etc.)? Thanks. SS To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: Glendale's City Attorney is Steve Lins. His phone number is 818-548-2080 and his email is slins@ci.glendale.ca.us. Please let me know if you need anything else. I will be in their offices on Wednesday. Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: Glendale's City Attorney is Steve Lins. His phone number is 818-548-2080 and his email is slins@ci.glendale.ca.us. Please let me know if you need anything else. I will be in their offices on Wednesday. Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: I need the city's bond counsel (outside counsel).

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: Is this to obtain outside opinion? I thought we were going to do that at our own expense.

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: Is this to obtain outside opinion? I thought we were going to do that at our own expense.

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: We are going to do this at our own expense. But we would like to hire Glendale's bond counsel. I don't know the name of Glendale's bond counsel or how to get in touch with them.

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: I will work on this for you and will be in touch. Thanks!

emails.subject: FW: City of Glendale
emails.body: Sara, FYI, how do we proceed? Kim

emails.subject: RE: City of Glendale
emails.body: Kim: Sounds like you're confused. ENA is requiring two opinions: one from Glendale (inhouse) and another which we are paying for (Glendale's outside counsel) Call me. Please do not forward my messages to Glendale because we are now at cross purposes. There is no need to alarm Glendale about our existing arrangements. Sara
